title: taraxacum purpurascens
intro: Taraxacum purpurascens, also known as the purple dandelion or purple daisy, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum purpurascens include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum purpurascens can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections.
